name: MENINGES OF SPINAL CORD
chapter: DIFFERENTIAL DIAGNOSIS OF SKULL AND SPINE DISORDERS
definition: GREAT ANTERIOR RADICULOMEDULLARY ARTERY most important feeder artery of thoracolumbar spinal cord
dominant_finding: normal thickness of epidural fat 3-6 mm at T7
discriminating_features: normal thickness of epidural fat 3-6 mm at T7

general: normal thickness of epidural fat 3-6 mm at T7
